_readme: Copy this file to your cache volume as discovery_overrides.json.
mode: 'replace' (default) - each section you provide fully replaces the
built-in list for that section. Omitted sections are untouched, so you
can replace just cast without affecting studios or directors.
mode: 'merge' - your entries are added on top of the built-in lists.
Useful for adding a few names without losing the defaults.
Keys (left) are the exact name as it appears in TMDB credits.
Values (right) are the display label shown on the sash - keep them short, ideally max 15 characters.
Remove the '_readme' key before use (or leave it - it is ignored).
